zh.of Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Beauflour於大約1395年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Thomas Beauflour23歲，母親Agnes20歲。她於1426年9月之前與William Pavy結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1466年之後在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托。

zh-hans.of Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Beauflour于大约1395年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Thomas Beauflour23岁，母亲Agnes20岁。她于1426年9月之前与William Pavy结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1466年之后在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Beauflour was born about 1395, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Thomas Beauflour, was 23 and her mother, Agnes, was 20. She married William Pavy before September 1426. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1466, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Beauflour est née environ 1395, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Beauflour, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Pavy avant septembre 1426. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1466, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Beauflour um 1395 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Beauflour 23 und ihre Mutter Agnes 20. Sie hat vor September 1426 William Pavy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1466 in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Beauflour è nata il circa 1395 nel Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Thomas Beauflour, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Pavy prima del settembre 1426. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1466, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストル
ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.of Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストル
ja.lifeSummary: Joan Beauflourが約1395年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Beauflourは23歳，母Agnesは20歳であった。1426年9月以前にWilliam Pavyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1466年以後にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Beauflour(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Beauflour(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1426년 9월 이전 William Pavy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 이후 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Beauflour nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Beauflour, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Pavy antes setembro de 1426. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1466, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Beauflour родилась около 1395 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Beauflour было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pavy перед сентябрь 1426 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1466 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия.

sm.about 1395–after 1466: e tusa o le 1395–ina ua ma'ea le 1466

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Beauflour nació aproximadamente 1395, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Beauflour, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Pavy antes de septiembre de 1426. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1466, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
